title: Combat Re-Imagined
body:
Combat Re-Imagined for Minecraft

Overview: Dive into a new world of combat with our Combat Re-Imagined Mod for Minecraft! This mod enhances the way you engage in battles, introducing innovative mechanics and weapons that elevate your gameplay experience. From extended attack reaches to dynamic movement options, this mod promises to redefine your adventures in the exciting world of Minecraft. Please note that this mod is still in progress, with many more features and improvements on the way!

Attack Reach: One of the standout features of this mod is the introduction of attack reach. This new mechanic allows players to attack enemies from varying distances, adding a strategic layer to combat. Different weapons have different reach capabilities:

Axes: Enjoy a reach of 3 blocks, allowing for precise strikes while maintaining a close range.
Swords: With a reach of 4 blocks, swords offer an optimal balance between speed and distance, perfect for swift engagements.
Tridents: These powerful weapons boast an impressive 6 blocks of reach, making them ideal for ranged attacks and keeping foes at bay.
Dashing Mechanic: Introducing dashing, a dynamic movement option that allows players to quickly reposition themselves in combat. When wielding an axe or a scythe, players can dash forward, backward, or to the sides, increasing their mobility dramatically. The direction of your dash corresponds to where you're looking, allowing for quick escapes or aggressive advances. This feature enhances combat fluidity and lets players outmaneuver their opponents with style.

Scythe Weapon: Get ready to wield the scythe, a versatile new weapon that combines the strengths of both axes and swords. The scythe not only matches the attack damage of axes but also introduces unique mechanics:

Sweeping Attacks: With a wide arc, the scythe can hit multiple enemies in one swing, making it perfect for crowd control.
Dashing Capability: Like the axe, players can dash with the scythe, maximizing their mobility during fights.
Variable Attack Speed: Depending on the material used to craft the scythe, its attack speed may vary, allowing for strategic choices based on the resources at hand.
Sliding Mechanic: The mod also introduces a new movement mechanic called sliding. This ability allows players to gain speed without needing to wield a tool. However, sliding can only be performed horizontally. You can easily disable the slide feature by placing any item in your off-hand, giving you control over when to utilize this speedy maneuver.

Copper Tools: In addition to these exciting mechanics, we've introduced copper tools! While armor made from copper is still in development, players can craft and utilize a variety of tools that leverage the unique properties of copper. These tools will bring a fresh element to your resource gathering and crafting strategies.

Ongoing Development: This mod is a work in progress, and we’re committed to expanding its features and mechanics even further. Expect additional weapons, refined movement options, and new combat strategies in future updates. Our goal is to create a comprehensive combat system that complements the immersive world of Minecraft while enhancing the player experience.

Join us on this adventure and get ready to elevate your combat skills like never before! With a plethora of features and ongoing enhancements, the Combat Re-Imagined Mod is set to revolutionize how you play Minecraft. Stay tuned for updates, and prepare to engage in battles with newfound power and style!
